author: zachxbt
text: Investigation into @ravedao_ reveals the founders @fakefounder1 and @fakefounder2 are the same team behind two prior solana rugs ($SQUIB and $BONKAI) that drained ~$4M combined. The $RAVE token allocation shows 42% held by wallets funded from the same Binance hot wallet as the prior rugs. Screenshots + onchain evidence in thread.

author: zachxbt
text: It's been 48 hours since Bitforex halted withdrawals and their team has gone dark. $56M in user funds locked. This is looking like another exit scam - users should assume funds are gone.

author: zachxbt
text: Reminder: @jup_ag team will NEVER DM you first. Multiple phishing sites impersonating Jupiter are circulating today. Do not connect your wallet to any site you did not navigate to yourself.

author: zachxbt
text: The volume of memecoin rugs on Solana this month is unreal. Over 1,200 tokens pulled liquidity in the past 30 days per @dexscreener data. Investors need to do more onchain DD before aping.

author: zachxbt
text: Great work by @tayvano_ and @samczsun on the latest lazarus-linked cluster analysis. The attribution quality keeps improving.

author: zachxbt
text: Identified the operator behind the @fake_airdrop_claim scam - wallet 0xabc...def has drained ~$900k from victims across 3 months. Same individual operated 2 prior phishing clusters. Do not sign any txns from that wallet.

author: zachxbt
text: Onchain analysis of @someprojectxyz reveals 6 wallets controlled by team members (confirmed via funding trail) have been quietly dumping $XYZ into liquidity for the past 10 days - ~$2.1M sold while team publicly claimed 'no team sells.' $XYZ on ethereum, contract 0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678

author: zachxbt
text: The @munchables_ exploit (~$62M) was an insider job. The developer who held the upgrade keys transferred them to an attacker-controlled multisig 3 weeks before the drain. Full writeup attached.

author: zachxbt
text: @NeonLabsFinance has been claiming a 'strategic partnership' with Chainlink in their marketing for 6 months. Chainlink team confirms there is no such partnership and have sent a cease and desist. $NEON is trading on uniswap, ~$18M MC.
